zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Melton於1425年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可梅爾敦 霍爾時，他的父親Sir John Melton 7th Lord Lucy27歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Hilton23歲。他於1454年與Margery FitzHugh在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1458年4月23日享年33歲。

nameMeanings.name: Melton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from any of various places, for example in Leicestershire, Lincolnshire, Norfolk, and Yorkshire, all of which have the same origin as Middleton , with Old English middel replaced by its Old Norse equivalent methal after the Scandinavian settlement of northern and eastern England.

variants.name: Middleton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places so called. In over thirty instances from many different areas, the name is from Old English midel ‘middle’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. However, Middleton on the Hill near Leominster in Herefordshire appears in Domesday Book as Miceltune, the first element clearly being Old English micel ‘large’, ‘great’ (see Middlebrook ). Middleton Baggot and Middleton Priors in Shropshire have early spellings that suggest gem̄thhyll (from gem̄th ‘confluence’ + hyll ‘hill’) + tūn as the origin. This surname is also found in Scotland and Ireland.

History: A Scottish family of this name derives it from lands at Middleto(u)n near Kincardine. The Scottish physician Peter Middleton practiced in New York City after 1752 and was one of the founders of the medical school at King's College (now Columbia University) in 1767. One of the earliest of the Charleston, SC, Middleton family of prominent legislators was Arthur Middleton, born in Charleston in 1681. The name has also been established in Ireland since at least the 13th century; its presence was reinforced by settlers in the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Melton was born in 1425, in Melton Hall, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Melton 7th Lord Lucy, was 27 and his mother, Lady Elizabeth Hilton, was 23. He married Margery FitzHugh in 1454, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 23 April 1458, at the age of 33.

Il a épousé Margery FitzHugh en 1454, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 23 avril 1458, à l’âge de 33 ans.

ko.Stanton Saint John, Oxfordshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 스탠턴 스트 존
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Melton(이)가 1425년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 멜턴 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Melton 7th Lord Lucy(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Hilton(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1454년 영국 요르크실르에서 Margery FitzHugh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1458년 4월 23일 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Melton родился в 1425 г. в местности мелтон холл, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Melton 7th Lord Lucy было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Hilton, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery FitzHugh в 1454 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 23 апреля 1458 г. в возрасте 33 лет.
